name: Cult of the Possessed
source: Mordheim rulebook Part 2 - Warbands, fetched from https://www.broheim.net/downloads/rules/Mordheim%20-%20Part%202%20-%20Warbands.pdf on 2026-07-03. Cross-check against your own rulebook/errata (2005 Errata + Annual) before relying on it.

heroSlots.notes: 70 gc. Leader (6"). Wizard: uses Chaos Rituals (see Magic).

90 gc + cost of mutations, 0-2. Never uses weapons or armour. Causes fear. May start with one or more mutations (see exclusiveEquipment; first at listed price, each further mutation on the same model costs double). statMaximums null: fill from the Maximum Profile table.
25 gc + cost of mutations, 0-2. MUST start with one or more mutations (first at listed price, each further mutation on the same model costs double).

henchmenTypes.notes: 45 gc, 0-3. Uses the Darksouls equipment list. statMaximums null: fill Beastmen maximums from the Maximum Profile table.
35 gc, 0-5. Crazed: know no fear and automatically pass any Leadership test they must take.

exclusiveEquipment.name: Daemon Soul
exclusiveEquipment.restriction: Mutation — Possessed or Mutant only, bought at recruitment. First at listed cost; each further mutation on the same model costs double.
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: A Daemon lives in the warrior's soul: 4+ save against the effects of spells or prayers.

exclusiveEquipment.name: Great Claw
exclusiveEquipment.restriction: Mutation — Possessed or Mutant only, bought at recruitment. First at listed cost; each further mutation on the same model costs double.
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: One arm ends in a crab-like claw. No weapon in that arm, but +1 attack in close combat at +1 Strength.

exclusiveEquipment.name: Cloven Hoofs
exclusiveEquipment.restriction: Mutation — Possessed or Mutant only, bought at recruitment. First at listed cost; each further mutation on the same model costs double.

exclusiveEquipment.name: Tentacle
exclusiveEquipment.restriction: Mutation — Possessed or Mutant only, bought at recruitment. First at listed cost; each further mutation on the same model costs double.
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: One arm ends in a tentacle. May grapple to reduce the opponent's attacks by -1 (min 1); the mutant chooses which attack is lost.

exclusiveEquipment.name: Blackblood
exclusiveEquipment.restriction: Mutation — Possessed or Mutant only, bought at recruitment. First at listed cost; each further mutation on the same model costs double.
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: If the model loses a wound in close combat, every model in base contact takes a Strength 3 hit (no criticals).

exclusiveEquipment.name: Spines
exclusiveEquipment.restriction: Mutation — Possessed or Mutant only, bought at recruitment. First at listed cost; each further mutation on the same model costs double.
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: Any model in base contact takes an automatic Strength 1 hit at the start of each close combat phase (never criticals).

exclusiveEquipment.name: Scorpion Tail
exclusiveEquipment.restriction: Mutation — Possessed or Mutant only, bought at recruitment. First at listed cost; each further mutation on the same model costs double.
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: Extra Strength 5 attack each close combat phase; reduced to Strength 2 vs models immune to poison.

exclusiveEquipment.name: Extra Arm
exclusiveEquipment.restriction: Mutation — Possessed or Mutant only, bought at recruitment. First at listed cost; each further mutation on the same model costs double.
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: May wield a single-handed weapon (+1 attack) or a shield/buckler in the extra arm. A Possessed gains the extra attack but still may not carry a weapon.

exclusiveEquipment.name: Hideous
exclusiveEquipment.restriction: Mutation — Possessed or Mutant only, bought at recruitment. First at listed cost; each further mutation on the same model costs double.

specialRules: Cult of the Possessed. Fear: The Possessed cause fear. Wizard: the Magister uses Chaos Rituals. Mutations may only be bought when a model is recruited (never later); the first mutation on a model is bought at its listed price and every subsequent mutation on that same model costs double. Min warband size 3, max 15. | Human models use the standard human Maximum Profile (M4 WS6 BS6 S4 T4 W3 I6 A4 Ld9) from the core-rules Maximum Profile table — verify. Non-human models are left null; fill their racial maximums from that same table. | TODO: verify each Hero's skill-table access (Combat/Shooting/Academic/Strength/Speed) against the rulebook — the checkmark columns were ambiguous in the source PDF extraction.
